title: aristida annua
intro: Aristida annua, also known as June grass, is a type of annual grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aristida annua include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the relief of digestive problems. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
